subcodes.first_line: The heaven hath been folded up, and another heaven hath been spread forth, and it hath been raised through this Name whereby every Cause hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طویت السماء و بسطت سماء اخری و انها ارتفعت بهذا الاسم الذی به ظهر کل امر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
